title: BenchmarkRunFailed payload
description: Emitted when a benchmark run fails before producing a score. Captures the error in the typed shape from CONVENTIONS.md §Error Enum Shape so the failure is queryable by kind. Provenance is on the corresponding BenchmarkRunStarted via refs.caused_by_event_id — a failed run is still a recorded run and still replayable.

error_kind.description: Matches the ToolError variant names from CONVENTIONS.md §Error Enum Shape. NotFound: missing scenario/model/fixture. InvalidInput: scenario fixture rejected by validation. Unavailable: model endpoint unreachable, rate-limited, etc. Internal: unexpected runner failure.

error_detail.description: Free-text detail. The runner's error message verbatim; helps debugging without forcing a join to a separate error-log store.

wall_clock_ms.description: Time spent before the failure; null if the failure happened before timing started.
